task:
Fix hardcoded install paths in skills/excalidraw/SKILL.md. Use the Edit tool.

There are 5 Python code blocks that each have this two-line pattern:
  import sys, os
  sys.path.insert(0, os.path.expanduser("~/.claude/plugins/duet/skills/excalidraw/scripts"))

Replace each of those two lines with these three lines (preserve surrounding indentation):
  import sys, os
  plugin_root = os.environ.get("CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT", os.path.expanduser("~/.claude/plugins/duet"))
  sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(plugin_root, "skills/excalidraw/scripts"))

Note: some blocks use single quotes around the path, others use double quotes — fix both variants.

Also fix the two bash examples:
  Change: cd ~/.claude/plugins/duet/skills/excalidraw/scripts
  To:     cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$HOME/.claude/plugins/duet}/skills/excalidraw/scripts"

  Change: node ~/.claude/plugins/duet/skills/excalidraw/scripts/export_playwright.js diagram.excalidraw output.png
  To:     node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$HOME/.claude/plugins/duet}/skills/excalidraw/scripts/export_playwright.js" diagram.excalidraw output.png
